reference: Welcome to HealthcareMagic. Most probably, you are receiving treatment for infertility. Polycystic Ovary Syndrome is a known cause of infertility and requires treatment to achieve pregnancy. Serological tests are conducted to observe the changes in hormone levels during treatment and to prescribe further medications as needed.
text: Look down to either side. What do you see? When you're uncomfortable with your own body, what kinds of faces do you see?
